full_prompt: Design the 1U CubeSat primary structural bus for an African-regional student CubeSat benchmark, launching via a standard P-POD-compliant dispenser. Envelope must comply with CDS Rev 14.1: 100.0 mm +/- 0.1 mm x 100.0 mm +/- 0.1 mm x 113.5 mm +/- 0.1 mm maximum, with four deployer rails of 8.5 mm minimum width at each corner, a minimum 75% anodized rail surface, and center of mass within +/- 2 cm of geometric center on each axis. Total wet mass must not exceed 2.0 kg. Material: Aluminum 6061-T6 (Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, density 2700 kg/m^3). Payload slot must expose a top aperture of at least 60 x 60 mm for a camera sensor and supply four M3 mounting bosses on an 80 x 80 mm bolt pattern. Load cases: (LC1) quasi-static launch: 14 g applied simultaneously on each of the three body axes on the wet 2.0 kg mass; (LC2) random vibration per CDS 14.1 Grms qualification profile (20-2000 Hz ASD table), response captured over 2 minutes per axis; (LC3) sine sweep: 10-100 Hz at 2 g base sweep, one octave per minute; (LC4) thermal cycling: -40 C to +85 C, 10 cycles, as a uniform swing with a 15 C internal electronics delta. Pass/fail per NASA-STD-5001B protoflight: max von Mises <= 276 / 1.25 = 220 MPa on yield and 310 / 1.4 = 221 MPa on ultimate under LC1; first natural frequency >= 100 Hz; random-vib 3-sigma response stress <= 220 MPa; thermal-deformation-induced CM shift <= 2 mm on any axis. Deliverables: STEP, modal (first 10 modes), FEA per case, random-vib PSD response report, thermal displacement contour, and mass/CM report.
short_prompt:
Design the 1U CubeSat primary structural bus for an African-regional student flight, launching in a standard P-POD. Material class: 6061-T6 aluminum. Qualify per Cal Poly CubeSat Design Specification (CDS) Rev 14.1 and NASA-STD-5001B metallic protoflight, with yield FoS 1.25 and ultimate FoS 1.4.

Envelope: 100 +/- 0.1 mm x 100 +/- 0.1 mm x 113.5 +/- 0.1 mm per CDS 14.1, four 8.5 mm corner rails, wet mass <= 2.0 kg, CoM within +/- 2 cm on each axis, payload slot with >= 60 x 60 mm top aperture on an 80 x 80 mm M3 bolt pattern.

Load cases.
- LC1 quasi-static launch: 14 g simultaneous on all three body axes, 2.0 kg wet mass.
- LC2 random vibration: CDS 14.1 Grms qualification profile, 20-2000 Hz, 2 min per axis.
- LC3 sine sweep: 10-100 Hz at 2 g base, one octave per minute.
- LC4 thermal cycling: -40 C to +85 C uniform swing, 10 cycles, 15 C internal delta.

prompt.title: African-regional 1U CubeSat primary structure
prompt.brief: 1U CubeSat bus compliant with CDS 14.1 and NASA-STD-5001B.
